name: Headphones
description: Experience immersive sound with these wireless headphones featuring deep bass, active noise cancellation, and up to 20 hours of battery life. Perfect for music, calls, and travel.

name: Smart Watch
description: Stay connected and track your health with this smartwatch. Includes heart rate monitoring, step tracking, sleep analysis, and smart notifications in a sleek design.

name: Shoes
description: Designed for comfort and style, these shoes feature a breathable upper, cushioned sole, and durable grip. Ideal for daily wear, walking, or casual outings.

name: Backpack
description: A versatile backpack with multiple compartments, padded straps, and durable material. Perfect for college, travel, or everyday use with ample storage space.

name: Sunglasses
description: Protect your eyes in style with these UV-resistant sunglasses. Lightweight frame and modern design make them perfect for outdoor activities and travel.

name: T-Shirt
description: Made from soft, breathable cotton, this t-shirt ensures all-day comfort. Features a relaxed fit and minimal design suitable for casual and everyday wear.

name: Laptop Bag
description: Carry your laptop safely with this padded laptop bag. Includes multiple compartments for accessories and a sleek design ideal for professionals and students.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Enjoy smooth navigation with this ergonomic wireless mouse. Features precise tracking, comfortable grip, and long-lasting battery performance.

name: Keyboard
description: A compact and responsive keyboard designed for efficient typing. Ideal for work or gaming with comfortable keys and durable build quality.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable Bluetooth speaker with powerful sound and deep bass. Enjoy wireless music streaming with long battery life and a compact design.

name: Power Bank
description: Keep your devices charged anywhere with this high-capacity power bank. Supports fast charging and multiple devices simultaneously.

name: Phone Case
description: Protect your phone from drops and scratches with this durable case. Slim design ensures a comfortable grip without adding bulk.

name: Hoodie
description: Stay warm and stylish with this soft hoodie. Features a comfortable fit, high-quality fabric, and a modern look for casual outings.

name: Jeans
description: Classic denim jeans with a modern fit. Made from stretchable fabric for comfort and durability, perfect for everyday wear.

name: Cap
description: A stylish and adjustable cap designed for comfort and everyday use. Lightweight and breathable, suitable for all seasons.

name: Watch
description: An elegant wristwatch with premium design and precise timekeeping. Perfect for both formal and casual occasions.

name: Monitor
description: Full HD monitor with vibrant colors and wide viewing angles. Ideal for work, gaming, and multimedia consumption.

name: Tablet
description: Lightweight tablet designed for entertainment, reading, and productivity. Features a responsive display and long battery life.

name: Smartphone
description: Powerful smartphone with high-resolution camera, fast performance, and long-lasting battery. Perfect for everyday use and photography.

name: Charger
description: Fast and reliable charger compatible with multiple devices. Compact design makes it easy to carry anywhere.

name: USB Cable
description: Durable USB cable designed for fast charging and data transfer. Built to last with reinforced connectors.

name: Desk Lamp
description: Modern desk lamp with adjustable brightness and flexible design. Perfect for study, work, or reading.

name: Notebook
description: Compact notebook ideal for notes, journaling, and daily planning. Smooth pages and durable cover for long-term use.
